final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [7:0] input1,
  input [7:0] input2,
  input enable,
  output reg [15:0] result
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
  if (reset) begin
    result <= 0;
  end else if (enable) begin
    result <= input1 * input2;
  end else begin
    result <= 0;
  end
end

endmodule
